title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 40
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about buying present for my cousin.
questions.audio_script: Woman: I need to buy present for my cousin, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a watch. || Girl: That might be nice. What about a board game? || Woman: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, [1]I chose a rucksack because she needs one for camping next month[/1]. || Girl: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty. || Woman: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I need to buy present for my cousin, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a watch.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That might be nice. What about a board game?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, I chose a rucksack because she needs one for camping next month.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.question: What did the speaker buy?

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, watch in a box, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, board game box without writing, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says they chose a rucksack because she needs one for camping next month.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a community centre.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What job are you doing at the community centre this afternoon? I thought you had to set out chairs. || Man: I did last week, but the cleaner did it earlier. || Woman: Are you going to paint the wall then? || Man: No, because the paint has not arrived. The manager just told me that [1]I need to welcome visitors at the door[/1]. || Woman: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Man: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Boy: What job do you have to do at home before bedtime? I thought you were going to charge the tablets. || Girl: No, they are already full. || Boy: Then are you going to turn off lights? || Girl: Not today, because Mum checks them. Mum said [1]my job is to close the curtains[/1]. || Boy: That should not take too long. || Girl: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Are we still seeing the new film after school? I brought everything for it. || Boy: I don't think so. There are no seats left, so it will not work today. || Girl: We could try the lake instead. || Boy: I thought about that, but it is too cold outside. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are playing a laser game this afternoon instead[/1]. || Girl: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Boy: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the revision class.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the revision class today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the classroom eight, but another group is there. Others may wait near the library, although there are no free tables. [1]Everyone should go straight to the computer suite after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the revision class today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the classroom eight, but another group is there. Others may wait near the library, although there are no free tables. Everyone should go straight to the computer suite after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about something broken in a music room.
questions.audio_script: Man: Something is broken in the music room, but I am not sure what. Is it the guitar case? || Woman: No, the handle is loose. || Man: Maybe it is the piano stool. || Woman: I checked that too, and it is just too low. [1]The problem is the keyboard, because some keys make no sound[/1]. || Man: We should tell someone before it gets worse. || Woman: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a leisure centre.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What did you do at the leisure centre last weekend? I thought you wanted to try badminton. || Girl: I did, but all courts were booked. || Woman: Did you do swimming instead? || Girl: No, because the pool was closed. In the end, [1]I spent most of the afternoon doing table tennis[/1]. It was better than I expected. || Woman: I might come next time. || Girl: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry. || Girl: I will send a message now, just in case.
